subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned! Thy remembrance hath come before the Most Great Remembrance, and the Lord of Eternity hath turned toward thee and maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور قد حضر ذکرک لدی الذکر الاعظم و توجه الیک مالک القدم و یذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
